vocab.meaning: sự im lặng thiêng liêng/đáng trân trọng
vocab.example: I often seek out the hallowed silence of an old library to escape the incessant noise of urban life.
I tend to avoid stadiums where the cheering of the crowd reverberates so loudly it becomes painful.
A weekend spent in a bucolic setting, far from traffic, helps me regain my mental equilibrium.

vocab.meaning: chói tai/váng đầu (âm thanh cực lớn)
vocab.example: The ear-splitting music in many popular nightclubs is actually quite a deterrent for me these days.

vocab.meaning: nơi trú ẩn khỏi cái gì
vocab.example: My local botanical garden serves as a perfect sanctuary from the clamor of the city streets.

vocab.meaning: sự sung sướng về thính giác (khi nghe âm thanh dễ chịu)
vocab.example: Listening to the gentle rustle of leaves in a quiet park is absolute auditory bliss compared to city sirens.

vocab.meaning: một góc nhỏ biệt lập/vắng vẻ
vocab.example: I enjoy finding a secluded nook in a quiet café where I can gather my thoughts in peace.

vocab.meaning: đường phố đông đúc, nhộn nhịp
vocab.example: While I appreciate a bustling thoroughfare for its energy, I rarely choose to spend my leisure time there.

vocab.meaning: sự yên bình và tĩnh lặng
vocab.example: All I crave after a high-pressure week is a bit of peace and quiet to reflect on my personal goals.

vocab.meaning: tiếng ồn ào náo nhiệt của đô thị
vocab.example: The relentless urban clamor can be quite draining, making quiet retreats essential for one's well-being.
